description.s: Context menu library. Builds context menu DOM for items with support for interactive mode (with click handlers) and inert mode (for documentation via functional transclusion).
— Add Child submenu with New Item and Existing Item options
— Copy ID, Duplicate, Make Root, Export as JSON, Delete
— View As submenu; returns { fragment, viewState }
— Debug submenu with debug views and system tools
— Find the editable view for a type (or null)
is provided, menu items get onclick handlers:
— function returning {x, y} or null (for spatial positioning)
is null (functional transclusion), items are inert.

findEditableView.name: findEditableView
findEditableView.description:
Find the editable view for a given type.
Returns the view item if found, or null.
Prefers direct (non-inherited) matches over inherited ones.
Skips debug/hidden category views.

buildAddChildSubmenu.name: buildAddChildSubmenu
buildAddChildSubmenu.description:
Build "Attach" submenu with "New Item..." and "Existing Item..." options.
When context is null, items are inert (no onclick) — used in documentation.

buildSimpleActions.name: buildSimpleActions
buildSimpleActions.description:
Build simple action menu items.
When context is null, items are inert (no onclick) — used in documentation.

buildViewAsSubmenu.name: buildViewAsSubmenu
buildViewAsSubmenu.description:
Build "View As..." submenu showing available views for an item.
Returns { fragment, viewState } where viewState contains debugViews,
currentViewId, and effectiveViewId for use by buildDebugSubmenu.
When context is null, items are inert (no onclick) — used in documentation.

buildViewSettingsItem.name: buildViewSettingsItem
buildViewSettingsItem.description:
Build a "View Settings..." menu item that opens the view settings modal.
When context is null, item is inert (no onclick) — used in documentation.

buildEditViewItem.name: buildEditViewItem
buildEditViewItem.description:
Build "Edit View" menu item — opens the active view's code in an editable view.
viewState: { currentViewId, effectiveViewId } from buildViewAsSubmenu.

buildViewSettingsPanel.name: buildViewSettingsPanel
buildViewSettingsPanel.description:
Build the view settings panel as a standalone DOM node.
Used for functional transclusion: item://2cc0a1c5-5c09-49bd-834a-eaa2d0183b6c?call=buildViewSettingsPanel&itemId=...
Shows current view preferences in inert mode (disabled selects, no handlers).

buildDebugSubmenu.name: buildDebugSubmenu
buildDebugSubmenu.description:
Build "Debug" submenu with debug views and system debug tools.
When context is null, items are inert (no onclick) — used in documentation.
context.debugViews, context.currentViewId, context.effectiveViewId come from viewState.

buildEmptyMenu.name: buildEmptyMenu
buildEmptyMenu.description:
Build the background/empty context menu (Search Items, Open REPL).
When context is null, items are inert (no onclick) — used in documentation.

buildItemMenu.name: buildItemMenu
buildItemMenu.description:
Build the full item context menu.
Includes all sections: Add Child, View As, View Settings, simple actions, Debug.
